strengths: Demonstrated experience with event-driven systems and distributed architectures, evidenced by GISCollective and prior roles in high-throughput environments
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong technical leadership and mentorship background, with a focus on software craftsmanship and best practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD) across multiple roles
concerns: Lacks direct experience in fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or regulated environments, which are core to the role
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or building senior leadership layers as required
No clear track record of architecting multi-agent AI systems for production use with real-time market data or financial consequences
response.justification: Bogdan has relevant technical expertise in event-driven systems and recent work in AI-agent tooling, but lacks critical fintech infrastructure experience and a track record scaling engineering teams to the required size. His background in distributed systems and software craftsmanship is promising, but the role demands deeper expertise in regulated financial environments and multi-agent AI production systems.
